raw_consumer_statement: Booked a hotel and tried to cancel with XXXX they told me it was booked through a third party. When we tried to cancel XX/XX/XXXX with the number they gave me it did not connect to anyone so i called my citibank XXXX XXXX to dispute the charge representative never filed the dispute when i didnt see a credit to my account i called back XXXX days later and filed dispute again. I am now told there is conflicting information between me and merchant I need to contact the merchant i never had a number for merchant and still do not. I never stayed in this hotel. Representative today XXXX told me the last representative never followed through reopening my dispute. Dont want my credit ruined but dont want to pay for something i never received. Will be paying in cash from now on! The amount XXXX not insignificant to me
